---
title: "Partial Differential Equations II: Nonlinear PDEs and Modern Methods"
subtitle: "CORE-014 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "Nonlinear PDEs, conservation laws, reaction-diffusion systems, and the modern theory of existence and regularity. The mathematical tools for modeling shock waves, pattern formation, turbulence, and complex dynamics."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Partial Differential Equations II: Nonlinear PDEs and Modern Methods

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
